name: JoAi: Delete Element Variation

description.en: Permanently remove a variation (including its images) from an element.
description.de: Entferne dauerhaft eine Variation (einschließlich ihrer Bilder) aus einem Element.
description.es: Permanently remove a variation (including its images) from an element.
description.fr: Permanently remove a variation (including its images) from an element.
description.ro: Permanently remove a variation (including its images) from an element.
description.it: Permanently remove a variation (including its images) from an element.

bot: Use this when the user wants to remove an unwanted variation. Use list_element_variations first to find IDs.

inputs.name: Element ID

description.en: The ID of the parent element
description.es: The ID of the parent element
description.fr: The ID of the parent element
description.ro: The ID of the parent element
description.it: The ID of the parent element

inputs.bot: The element hash ID this variation belongs to.

inputs.name: Variation ID

description.en: The ID of the variation to delete
description.de: Die ID der zu löschenden Variation
description.es: The ID of the variation to delete
description.fr: The ID of the variation to delete
description.ro: The ID of the variation to delete
description.it: The ID of the variation to delete

inputs.bot: The variation hash ID. Use list_element_variations to find IDs.
